local scriptBase64 = [[]]
local function decodeBase64(data)
    local b = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/'
    local dec = {}
    for i = 1, #data, 4 do
        local n = 0
        for j = 0, 3 do
            local c = data:sub(i+j, i+j)
            n = n * 64 + (c == '=' and 0 or (b:find(c) - 1))
        end
        table.insert(dec, string.char((n >> 16) & 255, (n >> 8) & 255, n & 255))
    end
    return table.concat(dec):gsub('\r\n?', '\n')
end
local decoded = decodeBase64(scriptBase64)
loadstring(decoded)()
